ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the survey */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., active, inactive, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generational_cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generational cohort */,
  "cohort_name" TEXT /* Name of the generational cohort (e.g., Younger Millennial) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the generational cohort */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the generational cohort */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the generational cohort */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the cohort */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the cohort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the question */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., political, social, technological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the response option */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the response option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response option was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the response option */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response option was last updated */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which the response options should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected response option (if applicable) */,
  "open_ended_response" TEXT /* Open-ended response text (if applicable) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the response is anonymous */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the respondent (if collected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES response_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generational cohort the respondent belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the respondent record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the respondent record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the respondent record was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES generational_cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the result belongs to */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generational cohort the result is for */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the result is for */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected response option (if applicable) */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* Number of respondents who selected this option */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who selected this option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was generated */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES response_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES generational_cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the survey */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_metadata_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
